ab: humnicuwa’ si muwah?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: huminakay cu.
en: I came on foot.

ab: gumiluw su’ kulu’ na nanuwan cu muwah?
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: guminluw ci cu bas’ muwah.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: humnicuwa’ si musa’ i kiyukay?
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: rasun cu na kulu’ ni yaba’.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: humicuwa’ musa’ papatiqan kariariax i hiya’?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: gumluw na ciyeyun musa’ papatiqan i hiya’.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: humicuwa’ musa’ mabaynay cu raramat i yaki’ su’?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: miray cu utubay musa’ mabaynay cu raramat i hiya’.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: pahicuwa’ si musa’ i Lanyu?
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: pagluw ci cu parnah musa’ i Lanyu.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: pahicuwa’ musa’ Lanyu i hiya’?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: pagluw na kulu’ na manbahaag musa’ Lanyu i hiya’.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: guluw na nanuwan musa’ Kawsiyung i hiya?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: guminluw na kawtiye’ musa’ Kawsiyung i hiya’.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: guminluw na kulu’ na hapuneq musa’ Taytung i hiya’ quw?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: uwal, gumluw na kulu’ na hapuneq musa’ Taytung i hiya’.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: guminluw na kulu’ na hapuneq musa’ Taytung i hiya’ quw?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: iqaat, gumluw na kulu’ na manbahaag musa’ Taytung i hiya’.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: kiya a nanaan cu bas’ tagi ruwni quw?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: kiya ga, usausa’ tiykay ru’ tatalan ku nanaan cu bas’ la.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: kiya inu’ ku maksasawbeh i runi ka nanaan cu ciyeyun?
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: ukas a ciyeyun i runi, paasiy su’ gluw cu takusi’ la.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: pakakituwa’ kiningasuw ga patayhuk i papatiqan?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: cakaan ru cakaan pincapngan cu wagi’ ga tayhuk i papatiqan.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: gumluw cu kawtiye’ aring Taype’ ru Taycung ga kituwa’ pincapng cu wagi’ ga patayhuk?
ch: A:搭高鐵自臺北到臺中要多少時間？
en: A: How long does it take to take the THSR from Taipei to Taichung?

ab: qutux pincapngan cu wagi’ ga tayhuk la i Taycung.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: muguaring Cirung miray cu kulu’ ga pakingasuw tayhuk i Ulay quw?
ch: A:從基隆開車去烏來要很久嗎?
en: A: Is it a long drive from Keelung to Wulai?

ab: iy ukas a tumukyi’ i raraneq ga, patayhuk i qutux pincapng cu wagi’.
ch: B:如果路況順利的話，大約要一個小時可以抵達。
en: B: If the road condition is good, it will take about an hour to get there.

ab: gumluw si cu ciyeyun muwah imuwag mu ga, pakingasuw quw?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要很久嗎?
en: A: Did it take you long to come to my house by subway?

ab: mausa’ cakaan pincapngan cu wagi’.
en: B: It takes 30 minutes.

ab: baaq si gumluw na tamayray quw?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: baaq ci gumluw na tamayray.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: kiya utubay su’ quw?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: kiya qutux utubay mu.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: kiya utubay su’ quw?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: ukas a utubay mu.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
